info.title: RES API
info.summary: Real Estate Scoring API — canonical contract for the SwissNovo suite.
info.description: Canonical OpenAPI 3.1 contract for the RES (Real Estate Scoring) API that powers the SwissNovo suite of apps. This document **describes the API exactly as it behaves today** — it is documentation, not a redesign. No endpoint, parameter, response shape, or auth rule was changed by introducing this file, so every existing client keeps working unchanged. ### Error contract — opt in to corrected status codes The legacy parcel and OEREB endpoints historically returned authentication and validation errors as **HTTP 200 with a plain-text body** (for example `Missing Token`, `Wrong Token`, `coordinate missing`). To correct this without breaking existing callers, the fixed behaviour is **opt-in** via a request header: - Send **`X-RES-API-Version: 2`** to receive a proper `4xx`/`5xx` status code with a JSON `{ "error": ... }` body. - Omit the header to get the unchanged legacy behaviour (HTTP 200 + plain text). **New integrations should always send `X-RES-API-Version: 2`.** Once every caller is migrated the default will be flipped. The `/score/*`, `/res_api/signal/*`, `/res_api/building_data`, `/res_api/bldg_vol_bbox`, and `/image/swissnovo/*` endpoints already use proper status codes regardless of the header. Note: `GET /res_api/parcel_image` is used directly in `` tags, which cannot send the header — it therefore always uses legacy behaviour. ### Scope This first revision covers the core app-facing surface: parcel data, scoring (POI), OEREB links, building data, images, and signal collection. The `/res_api/swissnovo_user`, `/res_api/claire`, `/roolez_api`, and `/reporter` routers are intentionally out of scope for this revision and will be added in a follow-up.

tags.name: Parcel
tags.description: Parcel data, geometry, imagery and building information.

tags.name: OEREB
tags.description: Official cadastral public-law restriction (OEREB) extract links.

tags.name: Signal
tags.description: User-activity signal collection and dashboard analytics.

get.description: Returns a static greeting confirming the RES API router is reachable.

200.description: Service is up.

post.summary: Get parcel data by coordinate or EGRID
post.description:
Returns full parcel data for a Swiss parcel, located either by WGS84 coordinate (`lat`/`lng`) or by parcel `egrid`.

With `structure: "default"` the response is the raw GeoServer GeoJSON `FeatureCollection`, enriched with `owner`, `isSignal`, `image_urls` and `OEREB_url` on the first feature's properties. With `structure: "tree"` the response is a grouped, human-readable object.

200.description: Parcel data. Shape depends on the `structure` field. Note: a missing/invalid token or missing location produces a plain-text 200 body (see `description`).

post.summary: Get parcel boundary geometry as DXF
post.description: Returns the parcel boundary as an AutoCAD DXF document, located by `lat`/`lng` or `egrid`.

200.description: DXF document, or a plain-text error body on missing token/location.

post.summary: Get a parcel and its neighbouring parcels
post.description: Returns the raw GeoServer GeoJSON `FeatureCollection` for a parcel located by `lat`/`lng` or `egrid` (currently the same query as `/res_api/parcel_data`; a bounding-box neighbour filter is planned).

200.description: GeoJSON FeatureCollection, or a plain-text error body.

post.summary: Render a parcel image (PNG) — JSON body variant
post.description: Renders a styled PNG of the parcel from the GeoServer WMS. Location is given by `lat`/`lng` or by `x_3857`/`y_3857` (Web Mercator).

200.description: PNG image, or a plain-text error body.

get.summary: Render a parcel image (PNG) — query-string variant
get.description: Same as the POST variant but driven entirely by query parameters. Used for `` URLs. The auth token is passed as the `token` query parameter, not a header.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: WGS84 latitude. Provide lat+lng or x_3857+y_3857.

parameters.name: x_3857
parameters.description: Web Mercator X. Provide lat+lng or x_3857+y_3857.

parameters.name: bounding_dist
parameters.description: Half-extent of the rendered bounding box, in metres.

200.description: PNG image, or a plain-text error body.

post.summary: Request a 3D building model (async, delivered by email)
post.description: Queues generation of a 3D building model. The model link is emailed to `target_email` asynchronously; the HTTP response only confirms the request was received.

target_email.description: Address the 3D model link is sent to.

200.description: Request acknowledged, or a plain-text error body.

schema.example: Request recieved. The 3D building link will be sent to user@example.com.

post.summary: Request contour (Contoor) data (async, delivered by email)
post.description: Queues generation of contour data for a parcel. The result is emailed to `target_email` asynchronously; the HTTP response only confirms the request was received.

target_email.description: Address the contour result is sent to.

200.description: Request acknowledged, or a plain-text error body.

schema.example: Request recieved... The Contoor will be sent to user@example.com

post.summary: Get building height and volume at a location
post.description: Returns building height and volume statistics for buildings at or near a coordinate, anywhere in Switzerland.

radiusMeters.description: Search radius for the target building, in metres.

strategy.description: Selection strategy for the upstream building service.

200.description: Building height/volume data passed through from the upstream building service.

post.summary: Building volume statistics within a bounding box
post.description: Aggregates building footprint count, volume and density within a circular bounding box around a coordinate.

bbox_radius.description: Bounding-box radius, in metres. Must be positive.

200.description: Building volume statistics.

get.summary: Current air quality at a location
get.description: Returns current air-quality conditions for a coordinate, proxied from the Google Air Quality API.

200.description: Air-quality data passed through from Google Air Quality, or a plain-text error body.

get.summary: Get OEREBlex documents for a municipality (FSO number)
get.description: Returns OEREBlex legal documents associated with a Swiss municipality, identified by its Federal Statistical Office (FSO) number.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of documents to return.

200.description: OEREBlex documents.

get.summary: List parcels that have signals (with coordinates)
get.description: Returns parcels that have associated activity signals, including aggregated counts.

200.description: Array of parcels with signal counts, or a plain-text error body.

get.description: Returns the complete cached signal dataset. Also reachable at `/res_api/signal_data_full`.

200.description: Full signal dataset, or a plain-text error body.

post.description: Returns water-balance scenario values (runoff, infiltration, evaporation, costs) for a given scenario number and parcel column.

parcel_num.description: Parcel column name to read values from.

200.description: Water-scenario rows, or a plain-text error body.

get.summary: Count of points of interest around a location
get.description: Returns POI counts within `search_area` metres of a coordinate. With `res_group=true` the counts are grouped into SwissNovo amenity clusters.

parameters.name: res_group
parameters.description: When `true`, group counts into amenity clusters.

200.description: POI counts (raw ORS stats, or per-cluster counts when grouped).

get.summary: Detailed points of interest around a location
get.description: Returns individual POIs within `search_area` metres of a coordinate, grouped into SwissNovo amenity clusters, each with name, distance, category and position.

parameters.name: res_group
parameters.description: Reserved; details are always grouped by cluster.

200.description: POIs grouped by amenity cluster.

get.summary: Detailed points of interest within a travel-time isochrone
get.description: Returns individual POIs reachable within `range` (seconds of travel time) of a coordinate for the given travel `profile`, grouped into SwissNovo amenity clusters.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Isochrone range, in seconds of travel time.

200.description: POIs grouped by amenity cluster.

post.summary: Get the OEREB extract PDF URL for a parcel
post.description: Resolves a parcel (by `lat`/`lng` or `egrid`) and returns the cantonal OEREB extract PDF download URL as a plain-text body.

200.description: OEREB extract URL, `no result...`, or a plain-text error body.

post.description: Uploads an image file and records it in the `images` table. Authenticated with the RES API token.

get.summary: Retrieve a legacy image file by ID
get.description: Streams the image file for a record in the `images` table. Authentication is currently disabled on this endpoint.

200.description: The image file.

get.summary: List legacy images for a user
get.description: Lists image records belonging to a user, newest first.

200.description: Image records for the user.

post.summary: Save a user image from a SwissNovo app
post.description: Saves a result image on behalf of the signed-in SwissNovo user. Authenticated with a Zitadel JWT bearer token; the user is taken from the `sub` claim.

app_source.description: Slug of the SwissNovo app saving the image (e.g. `scoore`).

prm_id.description: Optional linked parcel ID; must belong to the same user.

custom_metadata.description: Optional JSON object of extra metadata, sent as a string.

get.summary: List the current user's SwissNovo images
get.description: Lists images saved by the signed-in user, newest first, optionally filtered by app or linked parcel.

200.description: The user's saved images.

get.summary: Get one of the current user's SwissNovo images
get.description: Returns a single saved image record. Only the owning user may read it.

200.description: The image record.

delete.summary: Delete one of the current user's SwissNovo images
delete.description: Deletes a saved image record and best-effort removes the file from disk. Only the owning user may delete it.

200.description: Image deleted.

post.description: Records a user-activity signal from a SwissNovo app. If `parcel_id` is omitted but `target_lat`/`target_lng` are present, the parcel ID is resolved via SwissTopo. Authenticated with the API bearer token or an active session.

app_name.description: Slug of the originating SwissNovo app.

target_lat.description: Target WGS84 latitude (used for parcel lookup).

target_lng.description: Target WGS84 longitude (used for parcel lookup).

get.description: Returns collected signals with pagination, filterable by app, country and date range.

200.description: Paginated signals.

get.summary: List signals for a specific parcel
get.description: Returns collected signals targeting a given parcel, with pagination and the same filters as `/res_api/signal/list`.

200.description: Paginated signals for the parcel.

get.description: Returns signal counts aggregated by app, by country, and by day, optionally limited to a date range.

200.description: Aggregated statistics.

delete.description: Deletes a single signal record by its numeric ID.

200.description: Signal deleted.

ResApiToken.name: token
ResApiToken.description: Shared RES API token, sent in the `token` request header.

ResApiTokenQuery.name: token
ResApiTokenQuery.description: Shared RES API token, sent as the `token` query parameter. Used only by `GET /res_api/parcel_image` so the URL can be used directly in an ``.

BearerToken.description: Static API bearer token (`Authorization: Bearer <token>`). An active browser session is also accepted on these endpoints.

ZitadelJWT.description: Zitadel-issued JWT (`Authorization: Bearer <jwt>`). The user identity is taken from the `sub` claim.

JsonError.description: Standard JSON error body used by the newer endpoints.

ParcelLocationRequest.description: Locates a parcel by WGS84 coordinate (`lat`+`lng`) or by `egrid`. Provide one of the two.

structure.description: `default` returns the raw GeoJSON FeatureCollection; `tree` returns a grouped, human-readable object.

ParcelLocationRequestNoStructure.description: Locates a parcel by WGS84 coordinate (`lat`+`lng`) or by `egrid`. Provide one of the two.

ParcelImageRequest.description: Locates the parcel by `lat`+`lng` or by `x_3857`+`y_3857` (Web Mercator). Provide one pair.

bounding_dist.description: Half-extent of the rendered bounding box, in metres.

GeoJSONFeatureCollection.description: GeoJSON FeatureCollection from GeoServer. With `/res_api/parcel_data`, the first feature's `properties` is enriched with `owner`, `isSignal`, `image_urls` and `OEREB_url`.

ParcelTree.description: Grouped, human-readable parcel representation returned when `structure: "tree"`.

uuid.description: UUIDv5 derived from the parcel EGRID.

building.description: Building attributes (construction year, flats, floors, size, volume, heights).

plot.description: Plot attributes (area, ratios, GFA, max footprint/volume).

noise.description: Rail and street noise levels (day/night, min/mean/max).

travel.description: Travel times to the nearest agglomeration.

PoiDetail.description: A single point of interest within a scoring cluster.

distance.description: Distance from the query location, in metres.

location_index.description: Sequential index across all clusters in the response.

SwissnovoImage.description: A user-saved SwissNovo image record (`images_zitadel` table).
